canonical_question: What are Jitterbit integration platform capabilities, especially for the NetSuite ecosystem?
aliases: Jitterbit Harmony iPaaS features and pricing tiers
Jitterbit Cloud Studio vs Design Studio comparison
Jitterbit NetSuite connector capabilities and marketplace recipes
Jitterbit API Manager, App Builder, and EDI capabilities

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: Summer 2025 -- layered AI agents, App Builder AI Assistant GA

constraints: Pricing is opaque: Standard ~$1,000/mo, Professional ~$5,000/mo, Enterprise custom -- all annual contracts
Cloud Studio is strategic direction; Design Studio (desktop) receives no major new features
NetSuite connector uses SOAP only -- subject to NetSuite concurrency governance (default 5 concurrent)
API Manager rate limits: max 32,767 hits/min per environment; org-level monthly allowance
Marketplace recipes are read-only templates; must clone and customize
App Builder (LCAP) is not included in all editions -- confirm with sales

skip_this_unit_if.condition: User needs direct NetSuite SuiteTalk API without iPaaS middleware
User needs Celigo for NetSuite-specific integrations
User needs MuleSoft for API-led enterprise connectivity
User needs Boomi for hybrid cloud integration

related_to.label: NetSuite SuiteTalk API capabilities (underlying API Jitterbit uses)

often_confused_with.label: Celigo (both strong in NetSuite, but Celigo is NetSuite-first while Jitterbit is general-purpose)

inputs_needed.question: What integration pattern do you need?
Which system are you integrating with NetSuite?
options: Custom / other REST or SOAP API
